programs.title: Mexico Life 3
programs.desc: The creators of the program follow people looking for their perfect home in Mexico.Most of them dream of constant sun, beautiful beaches and water sports.Some people are looking for an entertaining nightlife, while others are looking for the traditional cuisine of the region.There are also many people who want to live in a secluded and quiet place on the coast.Local real estate agents will help them make a choice and find their own place in Mexican paradise.In each episode, specialists will present the characters with numerous offers from the real estate market, both the more expensive ones, but ready to move in, and the cheaper ones, but requiring renovation.

programs.title: Woman at the end of the world
programs.desc: For Martyna Wojciechowska, the most important value is freedom.During her travels in the ninth season of the program, she decided to show what she means to others - her characters.Malaysian fish people have cut themselves off from civilization.The Kazakh girl breaks all stereotypes and excels in activities reserved only for men.Pakistani Masarrat Misbah, thanks to her courage, is changing the world, restoring freedom to others.Kalashka Iran Bibi lives according to the centuries-old tradition of his ancestors despite external pressures.In Japan, Martyna Wojciechowska found people free from any prejudices.However, sometimes honest conversations bring further questions - about the price that Bolivian cholitas pay for their independence;about whether jihadist mothers could limit the freedom of their children, and whether Mennonites are making the right choice by consciously deciding on a life limited by rigid rules.

programs.title: Woman at the end of the world
programs.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska has been wandering the world for many years and looking for interesting people who share their unique stories with her.The traveler not only talks about their everyday lives, but also raises important social issues.In the tenth season of the program he will visit, among others:Spitsbergen - the largest island of the Svalbard archipelago, where it is night for a quarter of the year.He will also reach out to the Wodaabe community living in Chad, and in El Salvador he will address the difficult issue of restrictive anti-abortion regulations.
